author: ibarrajo
name: GQA + LZMA + Selective Pruning (SOTA-adopted stack)
blurb: Adopts all safe innovations from merged SOTA #1019: GQA (4 KV heads for faster steps), LZMA compression (better ratio), selective pruning (only prune if needed), BigramHash 3072x112. GPTQ stays within training budget.
